case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. NICOLE CLAY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-30-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, NICOLE
